response:
the sacred hymn siriragau mahala 3 speaks of the spirit's journey through devotion and the power of the word - the language of the divine - that guides the soul towards enlightenment - the gene of spiritual awakening is passed through the teachings of the guru - visit the path of the true master and let your spirit be cleansed - the soul finds peace when it merges with the divine - the true guru is the light that illuminates the path - the spirit is transformed through the grace of the guru - the language of the sacred is the key to understanding the divine - the gene of devotion is the foundation of spiritual growth - visit the temple of the heart and let the spirit be united with the divine - the true path is found through the grace of the guru - the spirit is awakened through the sacred word - the language of the soul is the sacred hymn - the gene of faith is the source of all spiritual power - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey towards enlightenment - the spirit finds its home in the divine presence - the language of the heart is the sacred truth - the gene of love is the essence of true devotion - the visit to the divine is the fulfillment of the soul's journey - the spirit is united with the divine through the grace of the guru - the language of the sacred is the path to salvation - the gene of faith is the foundation of the spiritual path - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the spirit is transformed through the divine word - the language of the soul is the sacred hymn - the gene of devotion is the source of all spiritual power - the visit to the divine is the beginning of the journey towards enlightenment.  

***  

the sacred hymn teaches that without the guru's grace, devotion cannot be achieved - the spirit must be united with the divine through the language of the sacred - the gene of faith is the foundation of spiritual growth - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the soul is cleansed when it merges with the divine - the language of the heart is the sacred truth - the gene of devotion is the source of all spiritual power - the visit to the divine is the fulfillment of the soul's journey - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the language of the soul is the sacred hymn - the gene of love is the essence of true devotion - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey towards enlightenment - the spirit finds its home in the divine presence - the language of the sacred is the path
